assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 1 explicitly shows control plane upgrade first using 'gcloud container clusters upgrade --master' before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states upgrade order as 'coordinator nodes → data nodes → master nodes (reverse order of criticality)' with clear rationale for each step

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Regional PVs survive node replacement - data persists through the upgrade' and mentions regional pd-ssd in cluster overview

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes with comment '(allows 1 master to drain, keeps quorum of 2)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows 'gcloud container node-pools update' commands with '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all three node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes curl commands to check cluster health after each phase and explicitly states to wait for GREEN status before proceeding between upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes 'PV reclaim policies set to Retain' with specific kubectl command to check this

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade validation includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' and monitoring sections show StatefulSet status checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Dedicated section 'Pre-Upgrade Elasticsearch Backup' with detailed curl commands for creating snapshots and marked as 'Critical'
